site.description: Dynamic QR codes with GPS geofencing and time-based routing. Print the code once. Route it forever.
hero.lede: ScanFence is a dynamic QR platform with GPS geofencing and time-based routing. Print the code once. Route it forever. Watch what scanned, what blocked, what's next.
features.01.title: Dynamic codes
features.01.body: Print once. Route forever. Repoint a code without reprinting.
features.02.title: GPS geofencing
features.02.body: Geography is the rule. Scans inside the perimeter open one door; scans outside open another.
features.03.title: Time-based routing
features.03.body: Different hour, different destination. The code reads the clock before it reads the visitor.
features.04.title: The receipt
features.04.body: Every scan leaves one. Device, place, hour, outcome. No surprises.
features.05.title: A small crew
features.05.body: Add the people who hold the keys. Role-based. Audit-clean.
features.06.title: No reprints
features.06.body: Change the destination at 11:47. It lands at 11:47.
cta.heading: Print the code yet?
pricing.title: Pricing — ScanFence
pricing.description: Simple, predictable pricing for dynamic QR codes with GPS geofencing. EU-hosted. 30-day trial on every plan. Cancel anytime.
pricing.hero.lede: Three plans, billed monthly or annually. 30-day trial on every plan, card at checkout, cancel anytime. EU-hosted. Print once, route forever.
pricing.billing.label: Billing period
pricing.tier.basic.name: Basic
pricing.tier.basic.blurb: For one venue, one menu, one operator.
pricing.tier.starter.name: Starter
pricing.tier.professional.name: Professional
pricing.tier.professional.blurb: For chains, agencies, and ad operations.
pricing.enterprise.heading: Need higher volume, regional residency, or a signed MSA?
pricing.enterprise.body: Custom plans for chains, agencies, and ad operations. Dedicated tenancy, per-region routing, custom uptime SLAs, and procurement-friendly paperwork.
pricing.compare.heading: Plan by plan.
pricing.faq.heading: The honest questions.
pricing.faq.a1: 30 days on every plan. You enter your card at checkout but can cancel any time during the trial — you won't be billed.
pricing.faq.a2: Every successful resolution of a dynamic QR — the redirect lookup. Blocked scans (out of geofence or schedule) are logged but do not count against your quota.
pricing.faq.a3: EU only — Ireland region. We never replicate scan metadata outside the EU. SOC-2 Type II.
pricing.faq.a4: Yes — upgrade or downgrade anytime. Prorated to the day, no contract lock-in.
pricing.faq.q5: What happens if I exceed my scan quota?
pricing.faq.a5: Codes keep resolving. We email you at 80% of your monthly quota so you have time to upgrade. Overages are charged at your plan's published rate, capped monthly.
pricing.faq.a6: Yes — switch the toggle above the plans. Annual saves about 17% versus paying monthly.
pricing.faq.a7: Talk to us. Custom volume, dedicated tenancy, regional residency, and signed agreements are available on the Enterprise plan.
contact.title: Contact ScanFence — Send a signal
contact.description: Get in touch with ScanFence. EU office. We reply within one business day.
contact.hero.lede: We read everything that lands. Replies usually within one business day. EU office. EU hours.
contact.form.heading: Write us a line.
contact.form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you're building…
contact.form.note: By sending this form you agree to be contacted about your inquiry. We never share your data.
contact.form.successBody.lead: We'll reply within one business day. Or email
contact.faq.heading: Frequently asked.
contact.faq.a1: Within one business day. Most questions answered same-day, Mon–Fri (CET).
contact.faq.q2: Can I book a product demo?
contact.faq.a2: Pick "Sales" and mention a preferred window. We send a calendar invite for a 20-minute walkthrough.
contact.faq.a3: Custom SLAs on Business and Enterprise plans, including 99.9% uptime commitments and priority support.
contact.faq.q4: Where do I find technical docs?
contact.faq.a4: Head to /docs for API references, webhook payloads, and SDK examples.
error.title: 404 — Page not found — ScanFence
error.description: That route was not found on scanfence.com.
error.lede: That URL is not on the perimeter. The page may have moved, been retired, or never existed. Try one of these instead:
